{{Quote|After all, it's not Devaronian government that made the deal with the Separatists. It was ''you''. The creds line ''your'' pockets, not theirs.|Aurra Sing|<ref name="Jedi: Aayla Secura">''[[Jedi: Aayla Secura]]''</ref>}}
'''Vien'sai'Malloc''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who jointly represented [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] with her colleague, [[Elsah'sai'Moro]].

==Biography==
Vien'sai'Malloc was known as one of the incorruptible senators in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. However, this was not so; after the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], she disagreed with [[President/Legends|President]] [[Aven'sai'Ulrahk]]'s policy of siding with the Republic, and secretly began establishing a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] base on the [[Blue Mountains]], allowing the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy]] to disrupt Republic resupply missions along the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]].

[[File:Aurra_Vien-sai-Malloc.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Aurra Sing makes her point to Vien.]]

Six months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], Elsah discovered what her colleague was doing, and planned to tell the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. Vien hired [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] to assassinate Elsah, as well as take care of the Jedi task force that had been sent to Devaron to investigate. When [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[The Dark Woman|An'ya Kuro]] and [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] went undercover, Vien revealed the coordinates of the Separatist base to Secura and was later arrested. Despite her wish for a trial by her peers in the Senate, President Aven'sai'Ulrahk sentenced her to [[Death/Legends|death]].
